comparison_details.title: Safety and effectiveness of surgical fixation versus non-surgical methods for the treatment of flail chest in adult populations: a systematic review and meta-analysis.

items.ai_reason: Title explicitly states the review is systematic.
Rationale is described in the context of existing knowledge about flail chest and its management.
Objectives are explicitly stated, focusing on comparing surgical and non-surgical interventions for flail chest.
Inclusion and exclusion criteria are specified, focusing on RCTs comparing surgical and non-surgical treatments.
